title: token_char returns '?' for non-delimiter tokens
description: form.rs: token_char() returns '?' for non-delimiter tokens (Word, Tag, StringLit, Number). It is used in error messages like "unexpected closing delimiter '?'". In practice this arm is unreachable because token_char is only called on tokens already known to be delimiters, but the function signature and wildcard arm do not make this constraint visible. A contributor might extend it or call it in a new context and get misleading errors. Add a comment on the _ arm, or restrict the input type to only delimiter tokens.
